options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Determines the goal of the seed

Final Battle: Beat Boss Cass in Final Battle and rescue your parents from The Dreaming

options.name: req_bosses
options.description: Determines if beating all bosses is a requirement to go to Final Battle

options.name: logic_difficulty
options.description:
What set of logic to use

Standard: The logic assumes elemental rangs are required to enter hubs

Advanced: Assumes hubs may be entered early and elemental rangs are optional

Doom: Assumes checks can be completed with the bare-minimum of items. WARNING: MAY CAUSE SUFFERING!

options.name: progressive_elementals
options.description: Determines if elemental rangs are a progressive check

options.name: thegg_gating
options.description:
If bosses are unlocked via hub Thunder Egg counts, required count per hub can be set here
This also sets the required Thunder Egg count to receive the elemental attribute check after completing bosses

options.name: extra_theggs
options.description:
Sets number of additional thunder eggs of each type to add to the pool
WARNING - Setting this value high without sanity is likely to lead to generation failures

options.name: cog_gating
options.description: Cog requirement count for each attribute check in Julius' lab

options.name: extra_cogs
options.description:
Sets number of additional golden cogs to add to the pool per attribute check
WARNING - Setting this value high without sanity is likely to lead to generation failures

options.name: level_shuffle
options.description: Determines whether the levels that portals lead to will be shuffled

options.name: level_unlock_style
options.description:
Determines how levels are unlocked

Vanilla: All levels are unlocked from the start of the world

Checks: The first level is unlocked from the start but all other levels are unlocked via checks

Checks - No Bosses: The first level will be unlocked from the start. Bosses can be unlocked via hub Thunder Egg counts. All other levels must be unlocked via checks

options.name: progressive_level
options.description: Determines if level unlocks are progressive (only if levels are check based)

options.name: gate_time_attacks
options.description:
If true, adds Stopwatch items to the pool which unlock the time attacks for each level
If false, time attacks are unlocked by completing the main objective thunder egg check for the level (vanilla)
Also adds checks for beating specific times in the time attacks

options.name: framesanity
options.description:
Determines how collecting Picture Frames grants checks

All: Every frame grants a check (127 Locations - Bonus Worlds not included)

Per Level: Collecting all frames in a level grants a check (9 Locations - Bonus Worlds not included)

None: Frames do not grant any checks

options.name: frames_require_infra
options.description: Determines whether the generator considers picture frames checks to be logically locked behind the infrarang

options.name: scalesanity
options.description: Determines whether each rainbow scale grants a check as well as the attribute check for finding all 25. Also adds extra health to the pool.

options.name: signsanity
options.description: Determines whether hitting each Maurie signpost with a boomerang grants a check.

options.name: lifesanity
options.description: Determines whether each unique extra life grants a check (not including basket lives)

options.name: opalsanity
options.description: Determines whether each opal grants a check

options.name: trap_fill_percentage
options.description: Determines the percentage of the junk fill which is filled with traps.

options.name: acid_trap_weight
options.description:
The weight of Acid Traps in the trap pool.
Acid Traps cause the screen to shift colors.

options.name: exit_trap_weight
options.description:
The weight of Exit Traps in the trap pool.
Exit Traps immediately force you out of the current level, putting you back in Rainbow Cliffs.

options.name: gravity_trap_weight
options.description:
The weight of Gravity Traps in the trap pool.
Gravity Traps cause Ty to fall much faster, and limit his jump height.

options.name: knocked_down_trap_weight
options.description:
The weight of Knocked Down Traps in the trap pool.
Knocked Down Traps knock you over and set your health to 1

options.name: slow_trap_weight
options.description:
The weight of Slow Traps in the trap pool.
Slow Traps cause Ty to move slower.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: mul_ty_link
options.description:
Whether other players connecting to the same slot should see each other.
This is soft limited to 8 players per slot. Use with caution.

options.name: music_rando
options.description:
Whether music is randomised based on the seed of the world.
The Ty1 Music Rando mod must be installed for this to function.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Bilbies - Bridge on the River Ty
Bilbies - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire
Portal - Bridge on the River Ty
Portal - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire
Stopwatch - Bridge on the River Ty
Stopwatch - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: Bilbies - Bridge on the River Ty
Bilbies - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire
Portal - Bridge on the River Ty
Portal - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire
Stopwatch - Bridge on the River Ty
Stopwatch - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"
options: Bilbies - Bridge on the River Ty
Bilbies - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire
Portal - Bridge on the River Ty
Portal - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire
Stopwatch - Bridge on the River Ty
Stopwatch - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Bilbies - Bridge on the River Ty
Bilbies - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire
Portal - Bridge on the River Ty
Portal - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire
Stopwatch - Bridge on the River Ty
Stopwatch - Lyre, Lyre Pants on Fire

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
